strengths: 16+ years shipping production fullstack systems with proven architecture skills across web, mobile, and infrastructure; MIT CS degree
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, code reviews, pair programming; consistent ability to build clean, testable systems
Core stack foundation in TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, MongoDB; current work with AI agent infrastructure shows ability to rapidly master new domains
concerns: React experience not explicitly documented; Ember.js and mobile frameworks shown but specific React proficiency unconfirmed
Modern JS testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not mentioned; testing rigor clear (TDD philosophy) but JS ecosystem expertise unclear
Enterprise authentication, authorization, and compliance work not highlighted; unclear if production experience includes strict security requirements

key_factors.factor: Track record of mastering diverse tech stacks

response.justification: Bogdan brings 16+ years of fullstack engineering with documented architecture expertise, software craftsmanship discipline (TDD, CI/CD), and MIT CS background. His TypeScript, Node.js, AWS, and MongoDB experience align with core stack, and his customer-delivery focus (shipped top-10 apps) demonstrates mid-senior capability. Primary gaps are unconfirmed React proficiency and modern JS testing framework expertise; however, his multi-framework background (Ember.js, iOS, desktop), consistent shipping track record across diverse technology domains, and current AI infrastructure work indicate rapid competency gain on tools like Vitest and React if given the opportunity to confirm during conversation.
